steps.t: Rísti Graver can be found at the Steepset in Máttugard. You should talk to Rísti Graver.
Mangur Bentpenny can be found in the Welkin-lofts. You should talk to Mangur Bentpenny about the Jewel of Abhâr.
Mangur Bentpenny can be found in the Welkin-lofts. You should <rgb=#FF0000>give</rgb> the silver drake-horn to Mangur Bentpenny.
Mangur Bentpenny can be found in the Welkin-lofts. You should talk to Mangur Bentpenny.
Iron Crown treasures can be found in the Welkin-lofts. You should collect Iron Crown treasures for Mangur Bentpenny.
Mangur Bentpenny can be found in the Welkin-lofts. You should <rgb=#FF0000>give</rgb> the Iron Crown treasures to Mangur Bentpenny.
Mangur Bentpenny can be found in the Welkin-lofts. You should talk to Mangur Bentpenny.
The Throne of Zidir-nesad can be found at the Steepset in Máttugard. You should add the Jewel of Abhâr to the Throne of Zidir-nesad under Rísti Graver…
Rísti Graver can be found at the Steepset in Máttugard. You should talk to Rísti Graver.
